text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ryan, do you have any plans
for our next day off?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'll be training, working out,
and building some muscle!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh… okay. Be careful not to get
any injuries then.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Wait… Did you want to invite me out?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Huh? N-No… I just… I was thinking
we haven't hung out in a while, so…

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Okay, why don't we go see a movie?
There's one I've been wanting to see!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! I'll do it on my next day off!
Now the movie is all I can think about!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Well that didn't take much convincing… haha.
Okay, movie it is!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'll reserve our tickets. I'll make sure
we get the best seats!
